plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Agent Azure OpenAI py Remote Debug

steps.description: Click the "Custom Engine Agent" dropdown option in the "New Project" dialog within Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" dropdown option in the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window within Visual Studio Code.
Select "Python" from the Programming Language dropdown menu in Visual Studio Code by clicking on the "Python" option.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" selection prompt to choose or locate the project's root folder.
